chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 1812 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.7819/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 03-10-2025 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Korai, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for Respondent No.3 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< Counsel appearing for Respondent No.3 submits that the moving tax earlier imposed by the Respondents has been recalled. After such statement of the learned counsel for respondent No.3, Counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is disposed of along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
